profiles.psynet_bot_rule: Rule-following PsyNet bot profile that selects the target answer.
profiles.scripted_noisy: Scripted inattentive profile with stochastic guesses and long response times.
profiles.mock_llm_memory_limited: Prompt-style mock LLM profile with limited ordered memory.
profiles.semantic_bias: Scripted profile that overweights semantically related alternatives.
